title: Meningococcal disease: laboratory-confirmed cases in England 2024 to 2025
body: "The epidemiological year runs from 1 July to 30 June the following year.  Reports for the most recent epidemiological years are available at:    Meningococcal disease: laboratory-confirmed cases in England in 2023 to 2024   Meningococcal disease: laboratory-confirmed cases in England in 2022 to 2023   Meningococcal disease: laboratory-confirmed cases in England in 2021 to 2022   Meningococcal disease: laboratory-confirmed cases in England in 2020 to 2021    Earlier reports in this series were published by Public Health England at Meningococcal disease: guidance, data and analysis. "
